'''Shella Harin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]], specifically [[Special Threats Division]]. As an Intelligence agent, one of Harin's assignments was to compile a report on the planet [[Leria Kerlsil]] with the help of Professor [[Bin Binnari]].
